item.title: |流水席最難的菜色？總鋪師的私房菜！Dishes for the Bando？#我的學習筆記 #533 ‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:title: |流水席最難的菜色？總鋪師的私房菜！Dishes for the Bando？#我的學習筆記 #533 ‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
I want to ask the master. In the movie "The Master Shopkeeper" He is actually saying. Every master will. wrestle, compete with each other. There are some grudges and hatreds. Is it true or false? Or added by the movie. Wu Nianzhen. The role of the chief chef. Fly Master. Oh! Yes, yes, yes. This fly master. He is in the underground tunnel of Taipei City. Cook for his friends. But he came to me and asked. Ask about the table. Like you just asked. Start talking about this. They talked about the culture of hosting a banquet. I told him all. Is this hatred true or false? Or should I say it's mutual assistance? because. I just heard the whole concept. It should be mutual assistance. Because after all. Your salary was quite low at that time. It wasn't until later that it slowly started to increase. So is this the whole. In fact, it is more. It's just the director's idea. The way I set up the table. What the chef said is true. It's all facts. At the beginning, I was more emotional. More humane. right. there is nothing. Disputes over money. Things will be different when you have money. When it's time to set up the table. Red Envelope Table. It started. There's competition from the beginning. You need 12,000 yuan to host a table. The red envelope is two thousand. I will give it to him if I get one thousand. The competition begins. Oh! So when money appeared at the beginning. It started with vicious competition. It's still like this now. Oh! It's still like this now. It's very competitive. But this competition. I don't think you can see it on that master. Because I saw. You are still the president of the Lions Club.

You can't hear it outside. Can't hear. Peers will compete with each other. Competing with each other. Currently. After the epidemic. complicated. It's really bitter. Very bitter. right. 以前很很好赚吶。Make good money. It's not profitable now. Oh! It’s not easy to make money now. Is it because of the epidemic? Epidemic relationship. Yes! But now the epidemic is almost over. I say it faster this way. Employee issues. I have no income for three years. Ah! Yes! You said you had no income for three years. My employees also have to live. He changed his career. He never came back. learn. After not coming back. It turns out that the employees are leaving. This is the master. No employee can do. So this employee is having a headache. Work shortage. There is a real shortage of workers in society now. yes. No work. There's just no work. Yes! Then I am more curious. This job vacancy. The person who came in before. Do you all want to be a chef? Or maybe not. Because if this era. People who want to be a chef. There should be quite a lot. Yes! A lot. I will go to the restaurant to learn. Oh! He always goes to the restaurant. Come and learn from the chief chef. After three years of study, he will go out to work. But the learning is not good. So you still have to learn. But it still takes ten years to learn. Me and my dad. Follow him until he is 70 years old. Well, I followed him until he was 70 years old. He said he wants to retire and do it for you. He can continue to do it. I can too.

Just give me the change. Do it for me. I handled it for the first two or three years. I did it all myself. My dad is sitting next to me. Guide me like this. so. Now that. Will the master still want to recruit students openly? It's hard to find a job now. This master is hard to learn. Others want to learn it in restaurants. The restaurant is doing well every day. We always go to the restaurant to host the banquet. This restaurant is doing good business. Business is good but it lacks workers. There is a shortage of workers,. so everyone starts to learn in restaurants. For example, the color of the dishes. Just learn this dish. Unless this restaurant has a special dish. very famous. It will become like this. Then I will eat. I will go eat. Go and meet the chef of that restaurant. That master. There is a dish that is almost lost. Could you tell us more about this? It is called chicken pig belly turtle in Taiwanese. Chicken and Pig Stomach Turtle. Turtle. This chicken pig belly turtle. Our previous practice was. Whole pork belly. A chicken is also a. The turtle was cut into smaller pieces. Put it in the chicken. Debone the chicken. This whole chicken is boneless. Put the turtle inside the chicken. Put the chicken in the pig's stomach. This is actually what I just talked about. Just pick out all the bones. That's it, right? You see, it's pig's stomach. It's ready to stew. After stewing, it is pig stomach. Then add medicinal food. To stew medicinal food. Put it at the bottom. To stew. I said you only saw a pig's stomach. Cut it when you want to eat it. I saw a chicken and a turtle. So this should be. I just introduced the most difficult dish to make. No one's doing it now.

Yes! Those are 7 or 8 pounds less. This chicken, pork belly, turtle. Yes, yes, they opened it directly. Yep! This one has been eaten. This is less troublesome. The chicken should be deboned and packed whole. But you taste. It should be different, right? Almost the same. More of the same. Still more of the same. learn. That pig belly. Cut it open. Use a chicken to stuff him in. Tie it up again. The whole pig stomach is very complete. Now, the whole pig stomach may not be possible. Too small. Use pig belly. Pig belly is bigger. The chicken can get in. This is it. This dish seems to be lost. Do you want to pass it on? Many people are doing it now. But you can’t eat this kind of ancient food outside. I can't eat it anymore. I can't eat it anymore. Yes! Would you like to take this. Is the ancient method passed down? No one does this now. Now cut it into pieces. Cut the pork belly into pieces. Cut the chicken into pieces. Cut into pieces. Boneless. Chicken base. Put the pig's stomach in the middle and the turtle on top. Take it to stew. Now let’s do it simply. The squid, snail meat and garlic. Squid, snail and garlic. To cross the water. Soak for two hours. No medicated food or other. Only with soju. Soak it. After soaking, use scissors. Cut into pieces. Hot. Start making the soup. This soup. We're going to use bamboo shoots. And snail meat. And pork belly. Make a dish.

Most of these dishes are restaurant dishes. After it's done, pour the soup in and you can serve it. This dish is relatively simple. Not as troublesome as chicken, pig and turtle. Yes! So it is also a common restaurant dish. Yeah. These two dishes are called restaurant dishes. Previous restaurant dishes. Sir, I want to ask you something. The Taiwanese dishes you cook are the most delicious. Or the most story-telling one. Could you share it with us? Shark fin soup. why? Premium Shark Fin Soup. Like that low-end shark fin soup. The low-end shark fin soup is much worse. High-end shark fin soup is more flavorful. Tasteful. What about the shark fin? More colloid. Now the low-end shark fin soup. It's just fish skin. Different taste. Still high-end. The shark fin soup. The way I do it is. Give it that flavor. Refine it. Control it. That control has a taste. Shark fin can also control the taste. Mushrooms and dried shrimps. Stir-fry and boil. Roll those materials. Then pick up all the materials. Let it keep rolling. Roll until the smell comes out. The smell of shark fin. Then use industrial vinegar. Cover up the taste? right. This is our Kung Fu dish. So he was actually the second person you learned from. But it is a dish with many variations. Yeah. Understand Understand. It's about the price tag. The relationship between price. learn. Because I speak more directly. Yes, yes. Very good. Very good. Yep. This is a Kung Fu dish. Eat some red rice wine meat. Few people make three-color eggs. Few people make three-color eggs?

Few people make the three-color eggs that I learned. at the beginning. Now, this dish is made simply by others. Someone simply made it and sold it. It's really troublesome to make this dish. Oh! It's very troublesome. Three-colored eggs are actually very troublesome, right? Trouble. A soup plate. A soup plate. Three-color eggs. preserved egg. Salted Egg. Arrange it. That egg white. Break the egg white. Solidify those. Then steam it. Cut into pieces. This is the method of three-color eggs. Oh! That's how it is. No one's answering now? No one does this kind of rough work. Some people do it, and the factory does it. Specially made for chefs to make cold dishes. Master, you don't have to do it. You don't have to do it. Just ask someone else to do it. If this master wants to do. It's not that easy to make three-color eggs. Understand Understand. Taiwan has to order everything it wants. Not like me, a master. I am a master. I make these three-color eggs every day. To follow the old-fashioned taste. Then why did you choose to settle here? I am a local. People who were born and raised here. I'm originally from Yongkang. For me, I went out before. Go out and explore for a year or two. Later I decided to come back. Because I didn't read. No one wants me to work. Understand Understand. So I. Nothing to hide. It's all my own experience. Just share it with us in a straightforward manner. Then start making this table. Not making a lot of money. I make a lot of money. It's also a loss. Master, what is your occupation? Do you run around cooking? Do you like working in the store? Or do it everywhere. It's better to run around.

More fun. More creative. More creative. you are here. I can only host five or six tables here. Oh! Yes, yes, yes! There are only five or six tables here. Sense of accomplishment. Make a signature dish. Become to say. You want to cook something more upscale. I can do it here. Because, for example. To make chicken bag. My friend Chen Tianshang. He will help me debone. I'll leave the deboning work to him. To make a more upscale dish. To make a good dish. Come here to eat. But I still prefer to go out and run like this. There is a lot of creativity outside. Then a lot of people feel like this. Yeah. That table of food. People invite 30 tables, 20 tables, 50 tables, 100 tables. After finishing. That sense of accomplishment is different. People will praise you. Praise you. The kind that people appreciate you. That feeling will make you feel very accomplished. Our table chef. There is a book. Someone compliments you. It really will go to heaven. learn. Very straightforward. really! Great sense of accomplishment. Got it! Got it! Master, do you have anything? What I want to say to the younger generation. Or want something to add? Do it well. Do it well. The young man. You have to be creative. Be Creative. Don't be afraid of hard work. If you are afraid of heat, don't go into the kitchen. Yeah. Today's show is almost over. Then I will say goodbye to you all first. Goodbye everyone. If you like it,. Please like, subscribe and share it for us. See you next time! Bye.

Thanks. Thank you, Master.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4kCtXaK6R7k

今天我們邀請到的還是嘉進師

來和我們聊聊臺灣特有的文化——總鋪師的故事🍲✨

總鋪師是臺灣宴會文化的靈魂人物

負責籌備和掌控整個宴席的進行

他們不僅是廚藝高超的大

更是能讓整個宴席有條不紊、賓主盡歡的掌舵人

嘉進師將為我們分享他成為總鋪師的經歷、總鋪師的日常工作

以及這個職業背後的文化意涵

更令人期待的是，嘉進師還會介紹他在辦桌上最拿手的招牌菜！

想知道更多關於總鋪師的有趣故事嗎？快來看看嘉進師的專訪吧！👨‍🍳🇹🇼

#臺灣 #台灣 #廚師 #台灣文化 #總鋪師 #臺灣文化 #人物訪談 #美食饗宴 #傳統文化 #歷史 #人文 #產業 #台南400 #台南 #臺南 #臺南400 #產業發展 #傳統產業 #辦桌

📍讓我們繼續活下去 ► http://bit.ly/2tGL3eB

https://reurl.cc/n77Rn6

我的學習筆記4

https://reurl.cc/mllNq9

🎬更多的學習筆記

YOUTUBE長影片討論 ► https://reurl.cc/gy2ZR

Tiktok上更多短影片 ► https://reurl.cc/bkjjz3

Facebook關注更多消息 ► https://bit.ly/2TFDZXC

Instagram掌握國際大事 ► https://reurl.cc/GyxEp

方格子學術公眾化成果 ► http://bit.ly/32J6mrK

DisCord群組一起聊天抬槓►https://discord.gg/YmSkbSVrUC

小額支付贊助我歐付寶►http://bit.ly/2Z1s1yA

當然還有PayPal►PayPal.Me/wMyNotebook

😉特別感謝6月份支持學習筆記的朋友

Polya Yang、柯誠譽、Rosemary 、阿里不打、Sion Ein、Roots Ko、Wu Pin-Ying、赤炎、懶虎提姆閣、Roy Li、KaHu Lau、葉小雲、李文傑、陳建宏、Louis Tseng、薩麥爾_MLBB、祈翠、Mariposa Bay、語禪、Krib Stek、張輔庭、whiskyhot886 、Chen Chong Lee、Charlie曾、蔡岳峰、Chung-Ming Wang、上善若水、林雋凱

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
item.description:
I want to ask the master. In the movie "The Master Shopkeeper" He is actually saying. Every master will. wrestle, compete with each other. There are some grudges and hatreds. Is it true or false? Or added by the movie. Wu Nianzhen. The role of the chief chef. Fly Master. Oh! Yes, yes, yes. This fly master. He is in the underground tunnel of Taipei City. Cook for his friends. But he came to me and asked. Ask about the table. Like you just asked. Start talking about this. They talked about the culture of hosting a banquet. I told him all. Is this hatred true or false? Or should I say it's mutual assistance? because. I just heard the whole concept. It should be mutual assistance. Because after all. Your salary was quite low at that time. It wasn't until later that it slowly started to increase. So is this the whole. In fact, it is more. It's just the director's idea. The way I set up the table. What the chef said is true. It's all facts. At the beginning, I was more emotional. More humane. right. there is nothing. Disputes over money. Things will be different when you have money. When it's time to set up the table. Red Envelope Table. It started. There's competition from the beginning. You need 12,000 yuan to host a table. The red envelope is two thousand. I will give it to him if I get one thousand. The competition begins. Oh! So when money appeared at the beginning. It started with vicious competition. It's still like this now. Oh! It's still like this now. It's very competitive. But this competition. I don't think you can see it on that master. Because I saw. You are still the president of the Lions Club.

You can't hear it outside. Can't hear. Peers will compete with each other. Competing with each other. Currently. After the epidemic. complicated. It's really bitter. Very bitter. right. 以前很很好赚吶。Make good money. It's not profitable now. Oh! It’s not easy to make money now. Is it because of the epidemic? Epidemic relationship. Yes! But now the epidemic is almost over. I say it faster this way. Employee issues. I have no income for three years. Ah! Yes! You said you had no income for three years. My employees also have to live. He changed his career. He never came back. learn. After not coming back. It turns out that the employees are leaving. This is the master. No employee can do. So this employee is having a headache. Work shortage. There is a real shortage of workers in society now. yes. No work. There's just no work. Yes! Then I am more curious. This job vacancy. The person who came in before. Do you all want to be a chef? Or maybe not. Because if this era. People who want to be a chef. There should be quite a lot. Yes! A lot. I will go to the restaurant to learn. Oh! He always goes to the restaurant. Come and learn from the chief chef. After three years of study, he will go out to work. But the learning is not good. So you still have to learn. But it still takes ten years to learn. Me and my dad. Follow him until he is 70 years old. Well, I followed him until he was 70 years old. He said he wants to retire and do it for you. He can continue to do it. I can too.

Just give me the change. Do it for me. I handled it for the first two or three years. I did it all myself. My dad is sitting next to me. Guide me like this. so. Now that. Will the master still want to recruit students openly? It's hard to find a job now. This master is hard to learn. Others want to learn it in restaurants. The restaurant is doing well every day. We always go to the restaurant to host the banquet. This restaurant is doing good business. Business is good but it lacks workers. There is a shortage of workers,. so everyone starts to learn in restaurants. For example, the color of the dishes. Just learn this dish. Unless this restaurant has a special dish. very famous. It will become like this. Then I will eat. I will go eat. Go and meet the chef of that restaurant. That master. There is a dish that is almost lost. Could you tell us more about this? It is called chicken pig belly turtle in Taiwanese. Chicken and Pig Stomach Turtle. Turtle. This chicken pig belly turtle. Our previous practice was. Whole pork belly. A chicken is also a. The turtle was cut into smaller pieces. Put it in the chicken. Debone the chicken. This whole chicken is boneless. Put the turtle inside the chicken. Put the chicken in the pig's stomach. This is actually what I just talked about. Just pick out all the bones. That's it, right? You see, it's pig's stomach. It's ready to stew. After stewing, it is pig stomach. Then add medicinal food. To stew medicinal food. Put it at the bottom. To stew. I said you only saw a pig's stomach. Cut it when you want to eat it. I saw a chicken and a turtle. So this should be. I just introduced the most difficult dish to make. No one's doing it now.

Yes! Those are 7 or 8 pounds less. This chicken, pork belly, turtle. Yes, yes, they opened it directly. Yep! This one has been eaten. This is less troublesome. The chicken should be deboned and packed whole. But you taste. It should be different, right? Almost the same. More of the same. Still more of the same. learn. That pig belly. Cut it open. Use a chicken to stuff him in. Tie it up again. The whole pig stomach is very complete. Now, the whole pig stomach may not be possible. Too small. Use pig belly. Pig belly is bigger. The chicken can get in. This is it. This dish seems to be lost. Do you want to pass it on? Many people are doing it now. But you can’t eat this kind of ancient food outside. I can't eat it anymore. I can't eat it anymore. Yes! Would you like to take this. Is the ancient method passed down? No one does this now. Now cut it into pieces. Cut the pork belly into pieces. Cut the chicken into pieces. Cut into pieces. Boneless. Chicken base. Put the pig's stomach in the middle and the turtle on top. Take it to stew. Now let’s do it simply. The squid, snail meat and garlic. Squid, snail and garlic. To cross the water. Soak for two hours. No medicated food or other. Only with soju. Soak it. After soaking, use scissors. Cut into pieces. Hot. Start making the soup. This soup. We're going to use bamboo shoots. And snail meat. And pork belly. Make a dish.

Most of these dishes are restaurant dishes. After it's done, pour the soup in and you can serve it. This dish is relatively simple. Not as troublesome as chicken, pig and turtle. Yes! So it is also a common restaurant dish. Yeah. These two dishes are called restaurant dishes. Previous restaurant dishes. Sir, I want to ask you something. The Taiwanese dishes you cook are the most delicious. Or the most story-telling one. Could you share it with us? Shark fin soup. why? Premium Shark Fin Soup. Like that low-end shark fin soup. The low-end shark fin soup is much worse. High-end shark fin soup is more flavorful. Tasteful. What about the shark fin? More colloid. Now the low-end shark fin soup. It's just fish skin. Different taste. Still high-end. The shark fin soup. The way I do it is. Give it that flavor. Refine it. Control it. That control has a taste. Shark fin can also control the taste. Mushrooms and dried shrimps. Stir-fry and boil. Roll those materials. Then pick up all the materials. Let it keep rolling. Roll until the smell comes out. The smell of shark fin. Then use industrial vinegar. Cover up the taste? right. This is our Kung Fu dish. So he was actually the second person you learned from. But it is a dish with many variations. Yeah. Understand Understand. It's about the price tag. The relationship between price. learn. Because I speak more directly. Yes, yes. Very good. Very good. Yep. This is a Kung Fu dish. Eat some red rice wine meat. Few people make three-color eggs. Few people make three-color eggs?

Few people make the three-color eggs that I learned. at the beginning. Now, this dish is made simply by others. Someone simply made it and sold it. It's really troublesome to make this dish. Oh! It's very troublesome. Three-colored eggs are actually very troublesome, right? Trouble. A soup plate. A soup plate. Three-color eggs. preserved egg. Salted Egg. Arrange it. That egg white. Break the egg white. Solidify those. Then steam it. Cut into pieces. This is the method of three-color eggs. Oh! That's how it is. No one's answering now? No one does this kind of rough work. Some people do it, and the factory does it. Specially made for chefs to make cold dishes. Master, you don't have to do it. You don't have to do it. Just ask someone else to do it. If this master wants to do. It's not that easy to make three-color eggs. Understand Understand. Taiwan has to order everything it wants. Not like me, a master. I am a master. I make these three-color eggs every day. To follow the old-fashioned taste. Then why did you choose to settle here? I am a local. People who were born and raised here. I'm originally from Yongkang. For me, I went out before. Go out and explore for a year or two. Later I decided to come back. Because I didn't read. No one wants me to work. Understand Understand. So I. Nothing to hide. It's all my own experience. Just share it with us in a straightforward manner. Then start making this table. Not making a lot of money. I make a lot of money. It's also a loss. Master, what is your occupation? Do you run around cooking? Do you like working in the store? Or do it everywhere. It's better to run around.

More fun. More creative. More creative. you are here. I can only host five or six tables here. Oh! Yes, yes, yes! There are only five or six tables here. Sense of accomplishment. Make a signature dish. Become to say. You want to cook something more upscale. I can do it here. Because, for example. To make chicken bag. My friend Chen Tianshang. He will help me debone. I'll leave the deboning work to him. To make a more upscale dish. To make a good dish. Come here to eat. But I still prefer to go out and run like this. There is a lot of creativity outside. Then a lot of people feel like this. Yeah. That table of food. People invite 30 tables, 20 tables, 50 tables, 100 tables. After finishing. That sense of accomplishment is different. People will praise you. Praise you. The kind that people appreciate you. That feeling will make you feel very accomplished. Our table chef. There is a book. Someone compliments you. It really will go to heaven. learn. Very straightforward. really! Great sense of accomplishment. Got it! Got it! Master, do you have anything? What I want to say to the younger generation. Or want something to add? Do it well. Do it well. The young man. You have to be creative. Be Creative. Don't be afraid of hard work. If you are afraid of heat, don't go into the kitchen. Yeah. Today's show is almost over. Then I will say goodbye to you all first. Goodbye everyone. If you like it,. Please like, subscribe and share it for us. See you next time! Bye.

Thanks. Thank you, Master.

😉特別感謝6月份支持學習筆記的朋友

Polya Yang、柯誠譽、Rosemary 、阿里不打、Sion Ein、Roots Ko、Wu Pin-Ying、赤炎、懶虎提姆閣、Roy Li、KaHu Lau、葉小雲、李文傑、陳建宏、Louis Tseng、薩麥爾_MLBB、祈翠、Mariposa Bay、語禪、Krib Stek、張輔庭、whiskyhot886 、Chen Chong Lee、Charlie曾、蔡岳峰、Chung-Ming Wang、上善若水、林雋凱

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
item.content:encoded:
I want to ask the master. In the movie "The Master Shopkeeper" He is actually saying. Every master will. wrestle, compete with each other. There are some grudges and hatreds. Is it true or false? Or added by the movie. Wu Nianzhen. The role of the chief chef. Fly Master. Oh! Yes, yes, yes. This fly master. He is in the underground tunnel of Taipei City. Cook for his friends. But he came to me and asked. Ask about the table. Like you just asked. Start talking about this. They talked about the culture of hosting a banquet. I told him all. Is this hatred true or false? Or should I say it's mutual assistance? because. I just heard the whole concept. It should be mutual assistance. Because after all. Your salary was quite low at that time. It wasn't until later that it slowly started to increase. So is this the whole. In fact, it is more. It's just the director's idea. The way I set up the table. What the chef said is true. It's all facts. At the beginning, I was more emotional. More humane. right. there is nothing. Disputes over money. Things will be different when you have money. When it's time to set up the table. Red Envelope Table. It started. There's competition from the beginning. You need 12,000 yuan to host a table. The red envelope is two thousand. I will give it to him if I get one thousand. The competition begins. Oh! So when money appeared at the beginning. It started with vicious competition. It's still like this now. Oh! It's still like this now. It's very competitive. But this competition. I don't think you can see it on that master. Because I saw. You are still the president of the Lions Club.

You can't hear it outside. Can't hear. Peers will compete with each other. Competing with each other. Currently. After the epidemic. complicated. It's really bitter. Very bitter. right. 以前很很好赚吶。Make good money. It's not profitable now. Oh! It’s not easy to make money now. Is it because of the epidemic? Epidemic relationship. Yes! But now the epidemic is almost over. I say it faster this way. Employee issues. I have no income for three years. Ah! Yes! You said you had no income for three years. My employees also have to live. He changed his career. He never came back. learn. After not coming back. It turns out that the employees are leaving. This is the master. No employee can do. So this employee is having a headache. Work shortage. There is a real shortage of workers in society now. yes. No work. There's just no work. Yes! Then I am more curious. This job vacancy. The person who came in before. Do you all want to be a chef? Or maybe not. Because if this era. People who want to be a chef. There should be quite a lot. Yes! A lot. I will go to the restaurant to learn. Oh! He always goes to the restaurant. Come and learn from the chief chef. After three years of study, he will go out to work. But the learning is not good. So you still have to learn. But it still takes ten years to learn. Me and my dad. Follow him until he is 70 years old. Well, I followed him until he was 70 years old. He said he wants to retire and do it for you. He can continue to do it. I can too.

Just give me the change. Do it for me. I handled it for the first two or three years. I did it all myself. My dad is sitting next to me. Guide me like this. so. Now that. Will the master still want to recruit students openly? It's hard to find a job now. This master is hard to learn. Others want to learn it in restaurants. The restaurant is doing well every day. We always go to the restaurant to host the banquet. This restaurant is doing good business. Business is good but it lacks workers. There is a shortage of workers,. so everyone starts to learn in restaurants. For example, the color of the dishes. Just learn this dish. Unless this restaurant has a special dish. very famous. It will become like this. Then I will eat. I will go eat. Go and meet the chef of that restaurant. That master. There is a dish that is almost lost. Could you tell us more about this? It is called chicken pig belly turtle in Taiwanese. Chicken and Pig Stomach Turtle. Turtle. This chicken pig belly turtle. Our previous practice was. Whole pork belly. A chicken is also a. The turtle was cut into smaller pieces. Put it in the chicken. Debone the chicken. This whole chicken is boneless. Put the turtle inside the chicken. Put the chicken in the pig's stomach. This is actually what I just talked about. Just pick out all the bones. That's it, right? You see, it's pig's stomach. It's ready to stew. After stewing, it is pig stomach. Then add medicinal food. To stew medicinal food. Put it at the bottom. To stew. I said you only saw a pig's stomach. Cut it when you want to eat it. I saw a chicken and a turtle. So this should be. I just introduced the most difficult dish to make. No one's doing it now.

Yes! Those are 7 or 8 pounds less. This chicken, pork belly, turtle. Yes, yes, they opened it directly. Yep! This one has been eaten. This is less troublesome. The chicken should be deboned and packed whole. But you taste. It should be different, right? Almost the same. More of the same. Still more of the same. learn. That pig belly. Cut it open. Use a chicken to stuff him in. Tie it up again. The whole pig stomach is very complete. Now, the whole pig stomach may not be possible. Too small. Use pig belly. Pig belly is bigger. The chicken can get in. This is it. This dish seems to be lost. Do you want to pass it on? Many people are doing it now. But you can’t eat this kind of ancient food outside. I can't eat it anymore. I can't eat it anymore. Yes! Would you like to take this. Is the ancient method passed down? No one does this now. Now cut it into pieces. Cut the pork belly into pieces. Cut the chicken into pieces. Cut into pieces. Boneless. Chicken base. Put the pig's stomach in the middle and the turtle on top. Take it to stew. Now let’s do it simply. The squid, snail meat and garlic. Squid, snail and garlic. To cross the water. Soak for two hours. No medicated food or other. Only with soju. Soak it. After soaking, use scissors. Cut into pieces. Hot. Start making the soup. This soup. We're going to use bamboo shoots. And snail meat. And pork belly. Make a dish.

Most of these dishes are restaurant dishes. After it's done, pour the soup in and you can serve it. This dish is relatively simple. Not as troublesome as chicken, pig and turtle. Yes! So it is also a common restaurant dish. Yeah. These two dishes are called restaurant dishes. Previous restaurant dishes. Sir, I want to ask you something. The Taiwanese dishes you cook are the most delicious. Or the most story-telling one. Could you share it with us? Shark fin soup. why? Premium Shark Fin Soup. Like that low-end shark fin soup. The low-end shark fin soup is much worse. High-end shark fin soup is more flavorful. Tasteful. What about the shark fin? More colloid. Now the low-end shark fin soup. It's just fish skin. Different taste. Still high-end. The shark fin soup. The way I do it is. Give it that flavor. Refine it. Control it. That control has a taste. Shark fin can also control the taste. Mushrooms and dried shrimps. Stir-fry and boil. Roll those materials. Then pick up all the materials. Let it keep rolling. Roll until the smell comes out. The smell of shark fin. Then use industrial vinegar. Cover up the taste? right. This is our Kung Fu dish. So he was actually the second person you learned from. But it is a dish with many variations. Yeah. Understand Understand. It's about the price tag. The relationship between price. learn. Because I speak more directly. Yes, yes. Very good. Very good. Yep. This is a Kung Fu dish. Eat some red rice wine meat. Few people make three-color eggs. Few people make three-color eggs?

Few people make the three-color eggs that I learned. at the beginning. Now, this dish is made simply by others. Someone simply made it and sold it. It's really troublesome to make this dish. Oh! It's very troublesome. Three-colored eggs are actually very troublesome, right? Trouble. A soup plate. A soup plate. Three-color eggs. preserved egg. Salted Egg. Arrange it. That egg white. Break the egg white. Solidify those. Then steam it. Cut into pieces. This is the method of three-color eggs. Oh! That's how it is. No one's answering now? No one does this kind of rough work. Some people do it, and the factory does it. Specially made for chefs to make cold dishes. Master, you don't have to do it. You don't have to do it. Just ask someone else to do it. If this master wants to do. It's not that easy to make three-color eggs. Understand Understand. Taiwan has to order everything it wants. Not like me, a master. I am a master. I make these three-color eggs every day. To follow the old-fashioned taste. Then why did you choose to settle here? I am a local. People who were born and raised here. I'm originally from Yongkang. For me, I went out before. Go out and explore for a year or two. Later I decided to come back. Because I didn't read. No one wants me to work. Understand Understand. So I. Nothing to hide. It's all my own experience. Just share it with us in a straightforward manner. Then start making this table. Not making a lot of money. I make a lot of money. It's also a loss. Master, what is your occupation? Do you run around cooking? Do you like working in the store? Or do it everywhere. It's better to run around.

More fun. More creative. More creative. you are here. I can only host five or six tables here. Oh! Yes, yes, yes! There are only five or six tables here. Sense of accomplishment. Make a signature dish. Become to say. You want to cook something more upscale. I can do it here. Because, for example. To make chicken bag. My friend Chen Tianshang. He will help me debone. I'll leave the deboning work to him. To make a more upscale dish. To make a good dish. Come here to eat. But I still prefer to go out and run like this. There is a lot of creativity outside. Then a lot of people feel like this. Yeah. That table of food. People invite 30 tables, 20 tables, 50 tables, 100 tables. After finishing. That sense of accomplishment is different. People will praise you. Praise you. The kind that people appreciate you. That feeling will make you feel very accomplished. Our table chef. There is a book. Someone compliments you. It really will go to heaven. learn. Very straightforward. really! Great sense of accomplishment. Got it! Got it! Master, do you have anything? What I want to say to the younger generation. Or want something to add? Do it well. Do it well. The young man. You have to be creative. Be Creative. Don't be afraid of hard work. If you are afraid of heat, don't go into the kitchen. Yeah. Today's show is almost over. Then I will say goodbye to you all first. Goodbye everyone. If you like it,. Please like, subscribe and share it for us. See you next time! Bye.

Thanks. Thank you, Master.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4kCtXaK6R7k

今天我們邀請到的還是嘉進師

來和我們聊聊臺灣特有的文化——總鋪師的故事🍲✨

總鋪師是臺灣宴會文化的靈魂人物

負責籌備和掌控整個宴席的進行

他們不僅是廚藝高超的大

更是能讓整個宴席有條不紊、賓主盡歡的掌舵人

嘉進師將為我們分享他成為總鋪師的經歷、總鋪師的日常工作

以及這個職業背後的文化意涵

更令人期待的是，嘉進師還會介紹他在辦桌上最拿手的招牌菜！

想知道更多關於總鋪師的有趣故事嗎？快來看看嘉進師的專訪吧！👨‍🍳🇹🇼

#臺灣 #台灣 #廚師 #台灣文化 #總鋪師 #臺灣文化 #人物訪談 #美食饗宴 #傳統文化 #歷史 #人文 #產業 #台南400 #台南 #臺南 #臺南400 #產業發展 #傳統產業 #辦桌

📍讓我們繼續活下去 ► http://bit.ly/2tGL3eB

LINE貼圖搜尋「我的學習筆記」或是點下方連結

我的學習筆記2

https://reurl.cc/qkk38y

我的學習筆記3

https://reurl.cc/n77Rn6

我的學習筆記4

https://reurl.cc/mllNq9

🎬更多的學習筆記

YOUTUBE長影片討論 ► https://reurl.cc/gy2ZR

Tiktok上更多短影片 ► https://reurl.cc/bkjjz3

Facebook關注更多消息 ► https://bit.ly/2TFDZXC

Instagram掌握國際大事 ► https://reurl.cc/GyxEp

方格子學術公眾化成果 ► http://bit.ly/32J6mrK

DisCord群組一起聊天抬槓►https://discord.gg/YmSkbSVrUC

小額支付贊助我歐付寶►http://bit.ly/2Z1s1yA

當然還有PayPal►PayPal.Me/wMyNotebook

😉特別感謝6月份支持學習筆記的朋友

Polya Yang、柯誠譽、Rosemary 、阿里不打、Sion Ein、Roots Ko、Wu Pin-Ying、赤炎、懶虎提姆閣、Roy Li、KaHu Lau、葉小雲、李文傑、陳建宏、Louis Tseng、薩麥爾_MLBB、祈翠、Mariposa Bay、語禪、Krib Stek、張輔庭、whiskyhot886 、Chen Chong Lee、Charlie曾、蔡岳峰、Chung-Ming Wang、上善若水、林雋凱

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
